## Overview
This issue tracks updates to the README.md to ensure it provides a comprehensive summary of all OctoAcme project management processes and clear navigation links to all documentation.

## Current State
The README.md includes:
- Overview section
- Documentation index with links to core docs
- Project lifecycle at a glance
- Key principles
- Getting started section

## Requested Updates
Please ensure the README includes:

### 1. Process Summary Section
A concise narrative that describes the full project management lifecycle and key workflows

### 2. Navigation Links
Clear, organized links to:
- Core process documents (Initiation, Planning, Execution & Tracking, Risk Management & Communication, Release & Deployment, Retrospective & Continuous Improvement)
- Reference materials (Roles and Personas, Project Management Overview)

### 3. Quick Reference
- Links to issue templates for process improvements
- Links to any additional reference materials

## Success Criteria
- [ ] README includes comprehensive summary of all project management processes
- [ ] All documentation links are organized and easy to navigate
- [ ] Documentation index is complete and up-to-date
- [ ] Getting started guidance is clear for new team members
- [ ] README follows markdown best practices
